close_reason: Changed ed25519 dep to workspace = true
description: In secretx-signature/Cargo.toml, the ed25519 optional dependency is declared as ed25519 = { version = "2", optional = true } rather than via the workspace table. All other algorithm deps (p256, rsa) use workspace = true. This inconsistency means ed25519's major version is not centrally controlled: a future workspace-level ed25519 bump will not update this crate unless the Cargo.toml is also edited, risking version skew between secretx-signature and other crates in the workspace that also depend on ed25519.
title: ed25519 dep pinned outside workspace in secretx-signature
